creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
This PR depends on ports/157745 and ports/157743. Please commit them first, then gnumeric.

Fix: This version requires a patch, which comes from
	http://git.gnome.org/browse/gnumeric/commit/?id=1d8b33e10e2de92369f1e99d3d4694fd15b557ec

	This patch will be merged into next release.
